revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-1-155

Spectral distribution curve (of a radiometric quantity radiant flux, radiant intensity, etc.)

Curve representing the spectral concentration of the quantity as a function of wavelength.


Reference: C.I.E. (extract)
